evals.prompt: What are the top movers in the market this week?
evals.expected_output: A compact inline HTML report with leaderboard cards (Highlights of the Week). No Trending Topics or Voice of the Market sections. Delivery mentions the option to request a full report.

assertions.description: Makes a single getTopMovers call with sortBy as an array of criteria
Does NOT call getEssentialInstructions (tool does not exist)
HTML is output inline in the response, not written to a file
Inline HTML has no DOCTYPE, html, head, or body tags
HTML embeds the LEADERBOARDS data constant
HTML includes the leaderboard grid (Highlights of the Week or equivalent)
Movers-only mode does NOT include Trending Topics or Voice of the Market sections
Company names link to ProntoNLP using the correct URL format
Report shows the specific date range covered
Delivery text mentions that the user can request a full report

evals.prompt: Show me a full market report for the past month focusing on tech and healthcare stocks.
evals.expected_output: Full inline HTML with all 3 major sections: Highlights of the Week, Trending Topics, and Voice of the Market. Date range is ~30 days. Sector filter applied for tech + healthcare.

assertions.description: Makes a single getTopMovers call with sortBy array and sectors filter
getTrends is called for the full report
getSpeakers is called for executives and analysts
Full mode HTML contains all 3 major sections
Date range is approximately 30 days
Report notes the tech/healthcare sector filter
HTML embeds the TRENDS data constant
HTML embeds executive/analyst speaker data constants

evals.prompt: Market overview for Q1 2026 — S&P 500 companies only.
evals.expected_output: Full inline HTML (market overview = full mode) covering Jan 1 – Mar 31 2026, filtered to S&P 500 index. All 3 sections present.

assertions.description: getTopMovers called with S&P 500 index filter
Report covers a Q1 2026 date range
S&P 500 filter is noted in the report
Market overview = full mode: all 3 major sections present
Inline HTML has no external CDN or DOCTYPE

evals.prompt: Show me only the biggest sentiment movers this week.
evals.expected_output: Minimal inline HTML with just the Biggest Sentiment Shift leaderboard. Shows BOTH most bullish (topMovers) and most bearish (underperforming) from the sentimentScoreChange result. No other leaderboards, no trends, no speakers.

assertions.description: getTopMovers called with only sentimentScoreChange in sortBy
Biggest Sentiment Shift leaderboard is present
Report shows both bullish and bearish movers
Other leaderboards are not present
assertions.pattern: Highest Investment Score|Biggest Investment Gain|Top Aspect Score

assertions.description: Trends and speaker sections are not present
